heading: Judicial review
label: 47532 Judicial review
text: An action taken by the Secretary of Transportation under any of sections 47528–47531 or 47534 of this title is subject to judicial review as provided under .section 46110 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision Notes. 103–272Pub. LRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4753249 App.:2157(f)., , .Nov. 5, 1990Pub. L. 101–508, § 9308(f)104 Stat. 1388–383
Pub. L. 103–429This amends 49:47532 to correct an erroneous cross-reference.
Amendments2012— inserted “or 47534” after “47528–47531”.Pub. L. 112–951994— inserted “any of” before “sections”.Pub. L. 103–429
